plugins.name: AC2 Reference
plugins.description: Reference OpenClaw plugin for the AC2 protocol. The `ac2` channel owns pairing over Liquid Auth + WebRTC; `ac2_sign` and `ac2_capabilities` route through the active channel session.

plugins.name: Active Memory
plugins.description: Runs a bounded blocking memory sub-agent before eligible conversational replies and injects relevant memory into prompt context.

plugins.name: Azure Speech
plugins.description: Azure AI Speech text-to-speech (MP3, native Ogg/Opus voice notes, PCM telephony).

plugins.name: Bonjour Gateway Discovery
plugins.description: Advertise the local OpenClaw gateway over Bonjour/mDNS.

plugins.name: Canvas
plugins.description: Experimental Canvas control and A2UI rendering surfaces for paired nodes.

plugins.name: Codex Supervisor
plugins.description: Supervise Codex app-server sessions from OpenClaw.

plugins.name: Device Pairing
plugins.description: Generate setup codes and approve device pairing requests.

plugins.name: Document Extraction
plugins.description: Extract text and fallback page images from local document attachments.

plugins.name: File Transfer
plugins.description: Fetch, list, and write files on paired nodes via dedicated node commands. Bypasses bash stdout truncation by using base64 over node.invoke for binaries up to 16 MB.

plugins.name: Inworld
plugins.description: Inworld streaming text-to-speech (MP3, OGG_OPUS, PCM telephony).

plugins.name: LLM Task
plugins.description: Generic JSON-only LLM tool for structured tasks callable from workflows.

plugins.name: Memory Wiki
plugins.description: Persistent wiki compiler and Obsidian-friendly knowledge vault for OpenClaw.

plugins.name: Claude Migration
plugins.description: Imports Claude Code and Claude Desktop instructions, MCP servers, skills, and safe configuration into OpenClaw.

plugins.name: Hermes Migration
plugins.description: Imports Hermes configuration, memories, skills, and supported credentials into OpenClaw.

plugins.name: OC Path
plugins.description: Adds the openclaw path CLI for oc:// workspace file addressing.

plugins.name: OpenProse
plugins.description: OpenProse VM skill pack with a /prose slash command.

plugins.name: Phone Control
plugins.description: Arm/disarm high-risk phone node commands (camera/screen/writes) with an optional auto-expiry.

plugins.name: Policy
plugins.description: Adds policy-backed doctor checks for workspace conformance.

plugins.name: Skill Workshop
plugins.description: Captures repeatable workflows as workspace skills, with pending review, safe writes, and skill prompt refresh.

plugins.name: Talk Voice
plugins.description: Manage Talk voice selection (list/set).

plugins.name: Thread Ownership
plugins.description: Prevents multiple agents from responding in the same Slack thread. Uses HTTP calls to the slack-forwarder ownership API.

plugins.name: Web Readability Extraction
plugins.description: Extract readable article content from local HTML web fetch responses.

plugins.name: Webhooks
plugins.description: Authenticated inbound webhooks that bind external automation to OpenClaw TaskFlows.

plugins.name: Workboard
plugins.description: Dashboard workboard for agent-owned issues and sessions.
